title: eremopyrum squarrosum
intro: Eremopyrum squarrosum, also known as Persian wild celery, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues. Eremopyrum squarrosum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and roots are used in traditional herbal remedies.
